# Cost 2 Heroes (MCGG S6)

Low tier: still common, the bridge into mid-game synergy.  11 heroes at this cost.

### Angela  (id 55, cost 2)

- **Class:** Scavenger  ·  **Faction:** Kishin  ·  **Position:** Back-row
- **Skill (Love Waves):** Angela releases Love Energy toward her current target, dealing (+570% Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG to enemies. Allies hit by the skill restore (+240% Total Magic ATK) HP.
